name: PUP
description: PUP is a meme token on BNB Smart Chain. Its name and concept originate from the visual wordplay where the lowercase letters "bnb" flipped upside down resemble "pup". The token was launched in October 2025 through a fair launch on Four Meme and PancakeSwap, with no taxes and no pre-allocations or insider advantages. All participants, including Binance Alpha holders, acquired tokens on the open market. Total supply is 1 billion tokens.
